contract_summary: This function releases reference-counted bfq_queue objects along a merge chain. It follows the new_bfqq pointers starting from the given bfqq and decrements each queue's reference count via bfq_put_queue. After calling this function, the caller must not use any of the released queues. The function is a put wrapper for a list of queues and does not return any status; the caller should ensure proper locking to protect the refcount operations.
